name: Huevos Rancheros
recipeIngredient: 6 Corn Tortillas; 6 to 7 inches in diameter
recipeInstructions:
1. The tortillas should be about 6 to 7 inches in diameter.
2. Cook and stir the sausage until fully cooked; drain excess fat and set aside.
3. Heat vegetable oil in a skillet over medium heat until hot enough to cook the tortillas without soaking up too much oil.
4. Fry each tortilla for about 1 minute on each side, then drain on paper towels.
5. Spread Casera Sauce evenly over each tortilla.
6. Place one-third of the cooked sausage and one-third of the cheese on top of the sauce.
7. Repeat with the remaining ingredients, spreading another Tbsp of sauce and half the cheese.
8. Serve hot.
